name: CADENCE: Closing the Reasoning Gap via Coverage-Adaptive On-Policy Distillation
summary: arXiv:2607.16955v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from large teachers to compact students, but existing approaches suffer three compounding fail...
description: arXiv:2607.16955v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from large teachers to compact students, but existing approaches suffer three compounding failure modes: (i) cold-start collapse, where a fresh student assigns near-zero mass to teacher-preferred tokens; (ii) state-agnostic divergence scheduling, where time-only forward/reverse-KL interpolatio...
author: Satyam Kumar, Saurabh Jha
